data.repeat_notification_enabled: Notify me before a repeat is due
data.prescription_notification_enabled: Notify me before my prescription runs out

data_description.repeat_notification_days_before: How many days in advance to remind you to order your next repeat (0-14).
data_description.prescription_notification_days_before: How many days in advance to remind you to contact your doctor for a new prescription (0-14).
